intent_summary: Build Field Monitor Snap-On Tool Phase 1 Bootstrap. Create Neon project field-monitor and run 001_initial_schema.sql. Schema: url_registry, field_state, check_log, error_log, rate_state tables. Apply CTB promotion enforcement trigger on field_state. Apply all indexes. Scaffold Cloudflare Workers monorepo at templates/snap-on/field-monitor/ with packages: orchestrator, fetcher, parser-registry, proxy-router, shared. Install @neondatabase/serverless and wrangler. Verify wrangler dev runs without errors.
phase_label: Bootstrap — Neon Schema + Workers Project Scaffold
go_condition: All Neon tables created. CTB trigger active. All indexes created. wrangler dev runs without errors.

agent_routing.db_agent: Run 001_initial_schema.sql against Neon. Verify CTB trigger fires on invalid insert, silent on valid insert.
agent_routing.builder: Scaffold monorepo at templates/snap-on/field-monitor/. wrangler.toml, package stubs, shared/ stubs, .github/workflows stub.
agent_routing.auditor: Verify all 5 Neon tables, CTB trigger, all indexes, wrangler.toml, shared/ stubs.

constraints: Do not expand scope beyond schema + scaffold
CTB trigger is constitutional law — do not simplify or omit
check_log is append-only — no UPDATE or DELETE
error_log is INSERT and UPDATE only — no DELETE
